Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/datasources/dataimportcron/details/DataImportCronDetailsGrid.tsx
2. Apply ONLY the change described by the migration rule at or near line 44
3. Make the minimum edit necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your change (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Write the fixed file
6. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through the fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edit, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists the change you made, or note if the fix was already applied or could not be applied (with a brief reason).
Let me start by reading the file to understand its structure and context.

Now let me analyze the situation:

**Migration rule**: `sd-cf-descriptionlist-descriptionlist-req-group` — This rule says that `DescriptionList` must contain `DescriptionListGroup` as a child. In PF v6, direct children of `DescriptionList` should be wrapped in `DescriptionListGroup`.

**Current structure**: The `DescriptionList` (line 44) directly contains multiple `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem`, `OwnerDetailsItem`, and `DataImportCronManageDetails` components as children — no `DescriptionListGroup` wrapping.

**What needs to happen**: Wrap the children of `DescriptionList` in a `DescriptionListGroup`. Looking at the children, each `VirtualMachineDescriptionItem` likely renders its own term/description pair internally. The conformance rule says `DescriptionList` must contain `DescriptionListGroup`. The simplest correct fix is to wrap all the children inside a single `DescriptionListGroup`.

Also, I notice the className is already `pf-v6-c-description-list` (already updated to v6), which is actually the default class applied by the component — so it's redundant but not harmful. I'll leave it as-is since the rule doesn't mention it.

I also need to add `DescriptionListGroup` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`.

Let me apply the fix:

arguments.after: import { DescriptionList, DescriptionListGroup, Grid, GridItem } from '@patternfly/react-core';

<DescriptionList className="pf-v6-c-description-list">
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              // body-content text copied from: https://github.com/kubevirt-ui/kubevirt-api/blob/main/containerized-data-importer/models/V1ObjectMeta.ts#L96
              bodyContent={t(
                'Name must be unique within a namespace. Is required when creating resources, although some resources may allow a client to request the generation of an appropriate name automatically. Name is primarily intended for creation idempotence and configuration definition. Cannot be updated. ',
              )}
              breadcrumb="DataImportCron.metadata.name"
              data-test-id={`${dataImportCron?.metadata?.name}-name`}
              descriptionData={dataImportCron?.metadata?.name}
              descriptionHeader={t('Name')}
              isPopover
              moreInfoURL={documentationURL.NAME}
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              // body-content text copied from: https://github.com/kubevirt-ui/kubevirt-api/blob/main/containerized-data-importer/models/V1ObjectMeta.ts#L102-L104
              bodyContent={t(
                'Namespace defines the space within which each name must be unique. An empty namespace is equivalent to the "default" namespace, but "default" is the canonical representation. Not all objects are required to be scoped to a namespace - the value of this field for those objects will be empty. Must be a DNS_LABEL. Cannot be updated. ',
              )}
              descriptionData={
                <ResourceLink kind="Namespace" name={dataImportCron?.metadata?.namespace} />
              }
              breadcrumb="DataImportCron.metadata.namespace"
              descriptionHeader={t('Namespace')}
              isPopover
              moreInfoURL={documentationURL.NAMESPACE_DOC}
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              // body-content text copied from: https://github.com/kubevirt-ui/kubevirt-api/blob/main/containerized-data-importer/models/V1ObjectMeta.ts#L84
              bodyContent={t(
                'Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services. ',
              )}
              descriptionData={
                <MetadataLabels
                  labels={dataImportCron?.metadata?.labels}
                  model={DataImportCronModel}
                />
              }
              onEditClick={() =>
                createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                  <LabelsModal
                    onLabelsSubmit={(labels) =>
                      k8sPatch({
                        data: [
                          {
                            op: 'replace',
                            path: '/metadata/labels',
                            value: labels,
                          },
                        ],
                        model: DataImportCronModel,
                        resource: dataImportCron,
                      })
                    }
                    isOpen={isOpen}
                    obj={dataImportCron}
                    onClose={onClose}
                  />
                ))
              }
              breadcrumb="DataImportCron.metadata.labels"
              data-test-id={`${dataImportCron?.metadata?.name}-labels`}
              descriptionHeader={t('Labels')}
              isEdit
              isPopover
              moreInfoURL={documentationURL.LABELS}
              showEditOnTitle
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              // body-content text copied from: https://github.com/kubevirt-ui/kubevirt-api/blob/main/containerized-data-importer/models/V1ObjectMeta.ts#L32
              bodyContent={t(
                'Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata. They are not queryable and should be preserved when modifying objects. ',
              )}
              descriptionData={
                <DataSourceAnnotations annotations={dataImportCron?.metadata?.annotations} />
              }
              onEditClick={() =>
                createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                  <AnnotationsModal
                    onSubmit={(updatedAnnotations) =>
                      k8sPatch({
                        data: [
                          {
                            op: 'replace',
                            path: '/metadata/annotations',
                            value: updatedAnnotations,
                          },
                        ],
                        model: DataImportCronModel,
                        resource: dataImportCron,
                      })
                    }
                    isOpen={isOpen}
                    obj={dataImportCron}
                    onClose={onClose}
                  />
                ))
              }
              breadcrumb="DataImportCron.metadata.annotations"
              descriptionHeader={t('Annotations')}
              isEdit
              isPopover
              moreInfoURL={documentationURL.ANNOTATIONS}
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <VirtualMachineDescriptionItem
              // body-content text copied from: https://github.com/kubevirt-ui/kubevirt-api/blob/main/containerized-data-importer/models/V1ObjectMeta.ts#L84
              bodyContent={t(
                'Time is a wrapper around time.Time which supports correct marshaling to YAML and JSON.  Wrappers are provided for many of the factory methods that the time package offers.',
              )}
              breadcrumb="DataImportCron.metadata.creationTimestamp"
              descriptionData={<Timestamp timestamp={dataImportCron?.metadata?.creationTimestamp} />}
              descriptionHeader={t('Created at')}
              isPopover
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <OwnerDetailsItem obj={dataImportCron} />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
          <DescriptionListGroup>
            <DataImportCronManageDetails
              onEditClick={() =>
                createModal(({ isOpen, onClose }) => (
                  <DataImportCronManageModal
                    dataImportCron={dataImportCron}
                    dataSource={dataSource}
                    isOpen={isOpen}
                    onClose={onClose}
                  />
                ))
              }
              dataImportCron={dataImportCron}
              dataSource={dataSource}
            />
          </DescriptionListGroup>
        </DescriptionList>
